allow:
Bash(KEY="65943b16665ff6fdd6ff254db92f224ec6db9673c24cc7a20ce7bba12e7fec3d"

echo "=== GET / \(no auth needed\) ===" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/ && echo

echo "=== GET /readyz \(no auth needed\) ===" && curl -s http://localhost:8000/readyz | python3 -m json.tool && echo

echo "=== GET /metrics/current ===" && curl -s -H "X-API-Key: $KEY" http://localhost:8000/metrics/current | python3 -m json.tool && echo

echo "=== POST /metrics/collect ===" && curl -s -X POST -H "X-API-Key: $KEY" http://localhost:8000/metrics/collect | python3 -m json.tool && echo

echo "=== GET /metrics \(last 1hr\) ===" && curl -s -H "X-API-Key: $KEY" "http://localhost:8000/metrics?hours=1&limit=5" | python3 -m json.tool && echo

echo "=== GET /alerts ===" && curl -s -H "X-API-Key: $KEY" http://localhost:8000/alerts | python3 -m json.tool && echo

echo "=== POST /alerts/test ===" && curl -s -X POST -H "X-API-Key: $KEY" http://localhost:8000/alerts/test | python3 -m json.tool)
